case_title: WILFREDO P. CRUZ et al VS. VIOLETA DE JESUS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ, WILFREDO P. CRUZ, NERISSA E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE JESUS, VIOLETA $180.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $210.00, (JUDGMENT INCLUDES ACTUAL DAMAGES OF $60.00, PLUS $120.00 STATUTORY DAMAGES UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(L) FOR A TOTAL OF $180.00) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
